Index.meta_description: Hive is your all-in-one SaaS platform. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Shadcn UI, and Tailwind CSS.

Hero.title: Everything your business needs, <important>Powerful in One</important>.
Hero.description: Hive is your complete SaaS platform — auth, billing, teams, analytics, and more. Launch faster. Scale smarter.

Features.section_title: Everything You Need to Run Your Business
Features.section_description: Hive brings together all the tools you need — in one powerful, unified platform.
Features.feature_description: Production-ready tooling so you can focus on building your product, not your stack.

Pricing.section_description: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees, no surprises.

FAQ.question: What is Hive?
FAQ.answer: Hive is an all-in-one SaaS platform designed to give your business every tool it needs in a single, unified workspace. From authentication and billing to team management and analytics — it's all here, Powerful in One.

CTA.title: Ready to build with Hive?
CTA.description: Join thousands of teams who chose Hive to power their business.

SignIn.meta_description: Sign in to your Hive account and get back to work.

SignUp.meta_description: Join Hive and start building your business today.

DashboardLayout.meta_description: Your Hive workspace — manage your team, projects, and settings all in one place.

DashboardIndexPage.message_state_description: Start customizing your workspace by editing dashboard/page.tsx.
DashboardIndexPage.message_state_alternative: Need more power? Hive supports multi-tenancy, roles & permissions, Stripe billing, and more.
DashboardIndexPage.max_message: Contact us at hansreyes30@gmail.com for enterprise support.
